picks.rationale: The Bucks, with their established core and championship aspirations, are consistently dominant against rebuilding teams. The Pistons, likely still developing their young talent in 2026, will struggle to contain Milwaukee's offensive firepower, leading to a comfortable Bucks cover.

picks.rationale: By 2026, Victor Wembanyama will be an even more dominant defensive force. Against a likely struggling Blazers offense, he'll have ample opportunities to patrol the paint and rack up blocks, easily surpassing the 2.5 mark.
